'''Kemel Trowe''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] who worked with the [[NAVCOR Command]]. After the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]], Trowe spread Imperial propaganda stating that [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Prestor Organa]] was working on a biowar program against the Empire and that the destruction of the planet was the only way to stop him from succeeding.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|4|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1st}}
